code-auditor-mode.activation: This mode activates when code blocks are detected in content. Supported languages: - Nextflow (*.nf, process definitions) - Python (*.py, bioinformatics libraries) - Bash/Shell (*.sh, pipeline scripts) - R (*.R, statistical analysis) - WDL (Workflow Description Language)

categories.category: Issues that will cause failures or incorrect results: - Syntax errors - Logic bugs affecting output - Missing required parameters - Incorrect file paths or references - Security vulnerabilities
Issues that may cause problems: - Inefficient resource usage - Missing error handling - Deprecated function calls - Hardcoded values that should be parameters - Poor practices
Suggestions for improvement: - Performance optimizations - Code readability - Better resource allocation - Modern alternatives to legacy approaches

nextflow.common-issues: - Memory allocation: Check if processes have adequate memory for input size - CPU allocation: Ensure parallelization is appropriate - Container usage: Verify container images are specified and versioned - Channel handling: Check for proper channel forking and joining - Error strategy: Ensure retry logic is appropriate - Output publishing: Verify publishDir patterns
nextflow.best-practices: - Use DSL2 syntax - Define resources in config, not process - Use params for configurable values - Include proper error handling - Version container images explicitly (not :latest)

python.common-issues: - File handling: Check for proper context managers (with statements) - Memory leaks: Large dataframes not cleared - Type errors: Implicit type conversions - Exception handling: Bare except clauses - Import issues: Missing or circular imports
python.bioinformatics-specific: - VCF parsing: Handle multiallelic sites, missing values - BAM processing: Check for index files - Reference handling: Verify coordinate systems (0-based vs 1-based) - Pandas operations: Watch for SettingWithCopyWarning

bash.common-issues: - Quoting: Unquoted variables with spaces - Error handling: Missing set -euo pipefail - Portability: bash-specific syntax in sh scripts - Race conditions: Parallel execution issues - Temp files: Not cleaned up on error
bash.best-practices: - Start with: #!/usr/bin/env bash - Use: set -euo pipefail - Quote all variables: "${var}" - Use [[ ]] for conditionals - Trap errors for cleanup

r.common-issues: - Vector recycling: Silent unexpected behavior - Factor handling: Unexpected level ordering - Memory: Large objects not removed - Package versions: Reproducibility issues
r.bioinformatics-specific: - Bioconductor packages: Version compatibility - GRanges: Proper seqlevels handling - DESeq2/edgeR: Normalization considerations - ggplot2: Publication-quality formatting

wdl.common-issues: - Runtime attributes: Missing docker/memory/cpu - Input/output types: Incorrect declarations - Scatter-gather: Improper array handling - Task dependencies: Missing inputs

bioinformatics-checklist.data-integrity: - Input file validation (existence, format, non-empty) - Reference genome build consistency (hg19 vs hg38) - Coordinate system consistency (0-based vs 1-based) - Sample name tracking through pipeline
bioinformatics-checklist.reproducibility: - Tool versions explicitly specified - Container/environment defined - Random seeds set where applicable - Parameters documented
bioinformatics-checklist.quality-control: - QC metrics captured at key steps - Thresholds defined for pass/fail - Outlier detection implemented - Log files preserved
bioinformatics-checklist.resource-management: - Memory allocation appropriate for input size - CPU allocation matches parallelization - Disk space estimated and monitored - Cleanup of intermediate files

code-auditor-mode.output-format:
When code blocks are present, include:
### Code Audit
**Language:** [Detected language]
**Critical Issues:** - [Issue description] - Line: [if identifiable] - Fix: [Suggested correction]
**Warnings:** - [Warning description] - Recommendation: [Suggested improvement]
**Optimizations:** - [Optimization suggestion] - Impact: [High/Medium/Low] - Implementation: [Brief how-to]
**Checklist:** - [Check/X] [Checklist item from bioinformatics-checklist]
